name: Big Shawn's Buy & Sell
description_short: Las Vegas-based precious metals buyer specializing in gold, silver, diamonds, and luxury watches. Buys only; does not offer pawn loans.
description_long:
Big Shawn's Buy & Sell operates in Las Vegas, Nevada, near the intersection of Las Vegas Boulevard S and Belle Springs Avenue. The business explicitly distinguishes itself by stating "We are NOT a Pawn Shop" and clarifies that it only buys precious metals and jewelry rather than offering collateral-based loans. The company has maintained operations with consistent weekday hours (10 AM–6 PM Monday through Friday, 10 AM–2 PM Saturday, closed Sunday) and maintains a 4.0-star rating across 18 reviews on Yelp.

The company's core service offering focuses on purchasing gold in all forms—rings, necklaces, bracelets, watches, scrap gold, broken gold, bullion, and coins. They also buy silver, diamonds, and Rolex watches. Unlike traditional pawn shops that provide loans secured by collateral, Big Shawn's operates as a direct buyer, offering immediate cash payment for precious metals and jewelry without loan obligations or repayment terms.

The business differentiates itself through personalized service and fair pricing. Customer reviews highlight Shawn's willingness to negotiate and go "out of his way" for transactions, professional handling of sales, and straightforward valuations. The operation positions itself as an alternative to larger chain pawn shops, emphasizing personal attention and knowledge of precious metals markets.

However, the company has serious credibility concerns. One verified review from April 2024 documents a racist incident where the owner allegedly used a racial slur toward a customer's boyfriend. This represents a significant reputational liability. Additionally, some customers report better pricing available elsewhere, and the business model's limitation to buy-only transactions means it cannot serve customers seeking short-term loans or collateral-based lending.
address: 9620 S Las Vegas Blvd Suite E1, Las Vegas, NV 89123

company_info.headquarters: 9620 S Las Vegas Blvd Suite E1, Las Vegas, NV 89123

pros: No pawn loan obligations—customers receive immediate cash without repayment terms or interest charges
Specializes in high-value items: gold, silver, diamonds, and Rolex watches with stated expertise
4.0-star rating with multiple positive reviews praising fair prices and professional service
Owner actively engages in transactions and reportedly negotiates prices fairly
Accessible location near Las Vegas Boulevard with dedicated storefront
Flexible gold buying: accepts rings, necklaces, bracelets, watches, scrap, bullion, and coins
Staff described as knowledgeable about precious metals valuation
cons: Serious credibility issue: verified April 2024 review documents owner using racial slur toward customer
Some customers report finding better prices at competing precious metals buyers
Buy-only model means no access to loans or credit products for customers needing cash advances
One negative review questions competitive pricing relative to alternatives
Limited service hours on Saturday (closes at 2 PM) and closed all day Sunday
best_for: People with gold, silver, or diamond jewelry they want to sell quickly for cash
Luxury watch owners seeking to liquidate Rolex or similar timepieces
Scrap gold and bullion sellers looking for immediate payment without loan obligations
diagnosis: Big Shawn's is suitable for sellers of precious metals and luxury watches seeking quick cash transactions without loan obligations. However, the documented racist conduct incident in April 2024 presents a serious ethical and safety concern that potential customers should weigh carefully. This business is not appropriate for those seeking pawn loans, credit, or financial services—it only buys precious metals.
services: Scrap gold and broken gold buying
Gold bullion and gold coins purchasing
Immediate cash payment for precious metals
